text:
Created attachment 255916
diff file for update to 1.41.3.9314

multimedia/plexmediaserver-plexpass: Update to 1.41.3.9314

 * New release from Plex.tv

  Changelog:

   https://forums.plex.tv/t/plex-media-server/30447/659

    NEW:
    (GPU) Updated the list of NVIDIA, Intel, and AMD HW devices.
    (Library) Added Folder Location filter for Movie, Episode,
     Track and Photo library views.
    (Web) Updated to 4.141.0

   FIXES:
   (Android) Fix regression for fix which addressed Nvidia Shield
    devices to crash periodically.
   (DB) Fetching media from database would crash if a part contained
    no streams.
   (Library) Edition titles were not being saved to the database
    correctly.
   (Library) In some cases library items were not properly sorted.
   (Library) Items would be removed from library if mount point
    became unavailable.
   (Livetv) Transcoding mpeg2 live-tv streams would fail on windows.
   (Music) Sonic Analysis would not trigger correctly for new albums
    after a scan.
   (Subtitles) Chinese subtitles were not correctly burnt in on
    MacOS 15.
   (Transcoder) Expat has been updated to 2.6.4, fixes CVE-2022-22822.
   (ViewStateSync) An exception could cause VSS to stop working

  QA:

   portlint OK (0 fatal errors)
